classmethodr.
Python runtime initialized with LC_CTYPE=C (a locale with default ASCII encoding), which may cause Unicode compatibility problems. Using C.UTF-8, C.utf8, or UTF-8 (if available) as alternative Unicode-compatible locales is recommended.z
Python detected LC_CTYPE=C: LC_CTYPE coerced to {} (set another locale or PYTHONCOERCECLOCALE=0 to disable this locale coercion behavior).c
